summary: v2.5.8 Filename Heuristics Classifier — backend-only regression. All 64 unit tests (test_filename_heuristics.py + three prior reclaim suites) pass, plus 14 new live-HTTP end-to-end tests against the public preview URL. Seeded TEST_iter230_* docs verified real mutation pipeline: type fields + before_heuristic + rule/confidence/note/applied_at/applied/actor + workflow_history event all stamped, status preserved at NeedsReview (never auto-clear). BC-evidence and known-doc-type safety, idempotency, min_confidence gating, and audit runs endpoint all verified. 4 prior regression endpoints still 200.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: review request mentions 34+11+11+9=65 tests but actual count is 34+10+11+9=64 (test_unknown_doc_reclaim_post_process.py has 10 tests, not 11). Not a defect — just a counting discrepancy in the request.

Observation: FILENAME_RULES use top-down first-match-wins. Ordering is currently safe (generic_invoice_prefix at 0.70 sits AFTER cargomo_invoice_prefix at 0.85, so CARGOMO wins). If new vendor-specific rules are added later, ensure vendor-scoped rules are placed before generic ones to preserve higher confidence. Consider adding an ordering-sanity unit test.

Safety: the apply() writer sets both filename_heuristic_applied_at (timestamp) AND filename_heuristic_applied (bool). The idempotency filter only checks the timestamp sentinel — consistent, but consider consolidating to a single sentinel to avoid drift.

The workflow_history entry uses from_status == to_status (intentional 'enrichment-only' event). Reviewers reading workflow timelines should be aware this is not a transition. Consider an explicit event_kind='enrichment' field for clarity when querying history.
test_credentials: admin / admin (endpoints are unauthenticated in preview env)
seed_data_creation: Seeded 7 ephemeral TEST_iter230_* docs in hub_documents via pymongo (TUMALOC, GROUPWA, CARGOMO, Lone Star, unmatched, BC-evidence, known-doctype). Plus one TEST_iter230_minconf_* doc created/cleaned per test. All cleaned up in module fixture teardown + filename_heuristic_runs actor filter.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The new test_filename_heuristics_http_iter230.py is reusable for regression. It uses pymongo (sync) for seeding/verification to sidestep motor event-loop issues. The admin/filename-heuristics endpoints are unauthenticated in preview. Prior endpoint path correction: GET history is at /api/admin/unknown-doc-reclaim/post-process/runs (not /post-process — that path only accepts POST).
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. Implementation matches all requirements in the review request.
